svg.title: How to implement DataToolbar in 3 steps
svg.desc: A three-step diagram showing how to implement the DataToolbar component: create a hook, wire it to the route, and place the component in the UI
svg.text: How to implement DataToolbar on any page
Create a hook — all logic lives here
Wire into the route — two lines of code
Place the component — one line of JSX
DataToolbar never changes · only write a new hook per page
